title: Gradient Flow in a Deep Neural Network
description: A visual representation of the backpropagation process, showing how gradients (partial derivatives of the loss function) are calculated and propagated backwards through the layers of a deep network to update weights.
relationships: Forward pass: Data flows left to right from input to output, calculating loss
Backward pass: Gradients flow right to left from loss function through layers via chain rule
Weight Update: Gradients dL/dW are used to update weights W := W - α * dL/dW
